reviews.comment:
Como siempre, lindo el predio con sus árboles añosos... aunque había algo de barro. Los baños bien. El Full (o como se llame) carísimo. Así que compramos sólo una gaseosa... nos quedamos sin almuerzo. Precios imposibles.

(Translated by Google)
As always, the grounds were lovely with their old trees... although there was some mud. The restrooms were fine. The Full meal (or whatever it's called) was ridiculously expensive. So we only bought a soda... we went without lunch. The prices were outrageous.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMteVBUQ253RRAB
